disabled.$description: Opacity value for disabled interactive elements (Material Design standard)

lufa.useCase: Apply to buttons, inputs, and controls in disabled state
lufa.note: References primitive directly — opacity is a universal utility constant with no brand-specific variation. The core layer adds no value here.

loading.$description: Opacity value for loading states and skeleton loaders

lufa.note: References primitive directly — opacity is a universal utility constant with no brand-specific variation. The core layer adds no value here.

placeholder.$description: Opacity value for placeholder text and empty states

lufa.note: References primitive directly — opacity is a universal utility constant with no brand-specific variation. The core layer adds no value here.
